title: Gemini File Analysis returns Internal Server Error for JSON
symptom: When sending a JSON file to Gemini for analysis, it returns an 'Internal Server Error'. The service indicates it cannot process the request.
not_this_if: File format is supported by Gemini
root_cause: Gemini does not support JSON files as valid document types for analysis. Attempting to process unsupported formats results in an internal server error.
fix_steps: Convert the JSON file to a supported format, such as CSV.
Send the converted file to Gemini for analysis.
agent_instruction: Convert the JSON file to CSV and retry the analysis with Gemini.
